assertions.reason: The pack detail route rendered the expected metadata editor, shared-axis summary, proto-persona section, pack summary, and audit-trail panel for the created pack.
Editing draft fields showed “Draft changes saved.” and the updated name, context, description, and axis copy rendered immediately on the detail page.
evidence: Updated visible values included “UT detail pack revised”, “Support escalation revised”, and the revised axis label “Clarity expectations”.

assertions.reason: Submitting the Add proto-persona form created a new proto-persona card on the draft pack detail page.
evidence: The created card “UT detail proto” appeared immediately under Proto-Personas for the same pack detail route.

assertions.reason: Evidence snippets entered as two separate lines were rendered back in order under the proto-persona card’s Evidence snippets section.
evidence: Visible evidence entries appeared in order: “Reads every hint before continuing” then “Looks for support links when unsure”.

assertions.reason: The browser surface confirmed manual creation shows “Source: manual”, but no JSON import control or imported persona example was exposed, so the json_import half of the assertion could not be validated.
evidence: Observed only the manual source label “Source: manual”; no import UI was reachable from /persona-packs or the pack detail page.

assertions.reason: Publishing the revised draft changed the visible status to published and the version to v2 on the same detail page.
evidence: Visible pack summary after publish showed Status published and Version v2.

assertions.reason: After publishing, the editable inputs and Add proto-persona control disappeared and the page became read-only aside from navigation/archive actions.
evidence: The published page showed static Name/Version/Description/Context summaries and only Back to list + Archive actions.

assertions.reason: The UI exposed Created by and a last-updated timestamp, but it did not expose modifier identity or any cross-user attribution flow, so the creator/modifier split could not be proven through the browser surface.

blockers: No browser-visible JSON import surface was available for persona packs.
The audit trail UI does not expose modifier identity for cross-user attribution checks.
